name: Baklava 1
recipeIngredient: Fillo dough (pastry leaves): 1 1/4 cups butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, cinnamon, and almonds.
2. Lay the fillo dough out on a table. Work quickly as it will dry.
3. Place a damp towel on the remaining dough to prevent drying.
4. On a medium-sized, buttered pan, lay one sheet of dough. Butter it.
5. Continue layering sheets (5-6) and almonds on the bottom.
6. Lay another unbuttered sheet, add more almond mix, then butter.
7. Repeat until all almond mix is used or 4-5 sheets remain.
8. Fold excess dough from sides, cut off dry parts, and butter remaining pieces.
9. Arrange more sheets, buttering each and cutting excess edges.
10. Butter the first layer well and sprinkle water before baking.
11. Cut top few unbuttered sheets in rhombus shapes using a sharp knife.
12. Bake according to recipe instructions.
